title: medicago papillosa subsp. macrocarpa
intro: Medicago papillosa subsp. macrocarpa, commonly known as large-seeded lucerne or large-seeded medic, is a subspecies of the annual legume plant Medicago papillosa, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its high content of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Medicago papillosa subsp. macrocarpa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
